title: Sniffin'
description: 4 new decorative, but funky plants for Sniffer to dig out!
body:
We are wasting so much time to craft a brush, then find ocean ruins, find a sniffer egg, then wait for it to hatch just for it to dig up 2 exclusive plants..

This mod makes Sniffer a little more worth it, by adding 4 new exclusive plants!

**Jellyboo** - tall plant with a funny looking.. flower?

![jellyboo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6266018ba8eb69f22a07afa7695384361b0c1913.png)

**Bulbstick** - from this image this plant may look boring and primitive, but just you wait til you see it in-game!

![bulbstick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1df6e71a0ac1812540ebe04efbdf990c2ecd43c6.png)

**Elevine** - vine-plant that has a different flower depending if you place it at the bottom or top.

![elevine_top](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8248b4ee9802897b42a76d85c6c5a4c883b7d282.png) ![elevine_bottom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a53de2a582e4781daf8a7aa633656c2f5e419e70.png)

**Tarstem** - tall plant that will grow even taller if you use bonemeal on it.

![tarstem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f45987e143dfacc8da3aaa4e58aeb7bee578fd6.png) ![tall_tarstem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d9cc096fb4a245f11ab4b815b9d247068048944.png)
